description: 'appropriately' in 'Configure timeout appropriately' — no measurable criteria given for what timeout value is appropriate
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete guidance, e.g. 'Set timeout to your p99 response time + 20%% buffer; REST API max is 29s'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Use appropriate models: Smaller models for simple tasks' — no measurable definition of 'appropriate' or 'simple'
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete guidance, e.g. 'Use Haiku for classification/extraction (<1k token context), Sonnet for generation, Opus for complex reasoning'

description: 'meaningful' in 'Set meaningful units for custom metrics' — 'meaningful' is undefined and unmeasurable
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set units matching the measured quantity (Count, Bytes, Milliseconds, Percent) so CloudWatch aggregations are dimensionally correct'

description: 'proper' in 'Implement proper error handling' — 'proper' gives no actionable guidance
suggested_fix: Replace with specific error cases: 'Catch NotAuthorizedException, UserNotConfirmedException, and PasswordResetRequiredException and map each to a user-facing message'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Choose appropriate EBS volume type' — no criteria for which type to choose
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Use gp3 for general workloads, io2 for >16,000 IOPS databases, st1 for sequential big-data throughput'

description: 'properly' in 'Configure health checks properly' — 'properly' gives no actionable criteria
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set healthCheckGracePeriodSeconds >= container start time; use /health endpoint returning 200 within 5s; set 3 retries'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Set appropriate deregistration delay' — no guidance on what value to use
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set deregistrationDelay.timeoutSeconds to match your longest in-flight request; 30s is safe for most HTTP services'

description: 'meaningful' in 'Use meaningful source names — company.service.component' — 'meaningful' is vague; the example partially helps but the qualifier is still undefined
suggested_fix: Drop the word 'meaningful': 'Use hierarchical source names in the format company.service.component (e.g. acme.orders.api)'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Set appropriate timeout — don't use max 15 minutes unnecessarily' — no guidance on how to determine the value
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set timeout to p99 execution time + 20%% buffer; start at 30s and tune down based on CloudWatch Duration metrics'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Configure appropriate backup retention' — no guidance on what retention period to choose
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set backup retention to 7 days minimum for production; 1 day is sufficient for dev/test; use 35 days for compliance-sensitive workloads'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Configure appropriate visibility timeout (> processing time)' — the hint '> processing time' helps but 'appropriate' remains vague
suggested_fix: Drop 'appropriate': 'Set VisibilityTimeout = max processing time × 6 to accommodate retries; minimum 30s'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Set appropriate maxReceiveCount (usually 3-5)' — 'appropriate' weakens the useful concrete range
suggested_fix: Drop 'appropriate': 'Set maxReceiveCount to 3–5; use 3 for fast-fail jobs and 5 for jobs with transient external dependencies'

description: 'appropriate' in 'Set appropriate timeouts' — no criteria for what timeout values to use
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Set TimeoutSeconds on each Task state to p99 execution time + 30s buffer; set HeartbeatSeconds for long-running tasks'

description: feedparser.parse() makes outbound HTTP calls to AWS RSS feed URLs; no timeout is configured so a slow feed can hang the workflow indefinitely
suggested_fix: Set a socket timeout before calling feedparser.parse(), or use requests with timeout and pass the response text to feedparser.parse(text)

description: Reads GITHUB_OUTPUT env var and appends pipeline outputs to the file it points to — standard GitHub Actions pattern but represents env-var consumption
suggested_fix: No change required; this is idiomatic GitHub Actions output. Add a guard: check that the path is within the runner workspace before writing.

description: subprocess.run() passes RSS-derived title and body strings as arguments to gh CLI; shell=False prevents shell injection but untrusted content is not length-capped or sanitised
suggested_fix: Truncate title to 256 chars and body to 65535 chars before building cmd; optionally strip non-printable characters from RSS-sourced strings

description: feedparser>=6.0.0 allows any future version including breaking major releases
requests>=2.28.0 is unpinned and not directly imported by either script (likely a transitive dep for feedparser)
suggested_fix: Either remove (let pip resolve transitively) or pin: requests==2.32.3

description: PyYAML>=6.0 is unpinned and not imported by any script in this repository
suggested_fix: Remove unused dependency or pin: PyYAML==6.0.2
